tagline: Treating Every Pool Like It's Our Own

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Centurion-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: From Key Largo to Naples, our 19-person team treats every pool like it is our own. Design, build, maintain, or repair — one call handles it all so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Lifecycle Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the thousandth weekly cleaning, Pool Centurion covers every stage of pool ownership across Southeast Florida.

cards.title: Pool Design & Consultation
cards.description: From dream to blueprint — we walk you through design visualization, budgeting, and planning so your new pool fits your lifestyle perfectly.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Full-service pool building with meticulous project scheduling, quality control, and transparent collaboration from groundbreaking to first splash.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Ongoing residential and commercial cleaning that keeps water crystal clear, chemicals balanced, and equipment running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Service
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. Most issues resolved in a single visit.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing & Renovation
cards.description: Breathe new life into aging pools with resurfacing, tile replacement, and deck upgrades that restore beauty and value.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Services
cards.description: Expert installation, maintenance, and repair for spas and hot tubs — the perfect complement to your pool care plan.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Centurion-Level Pool Care

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We will schedule a free on-site inspection, assess your pool's needs, and deliver an honest quote — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Deploy Your Team
steps.description: Our licensed, insured professionals arrive on schedule — whether it is weekly maintenance, a major repair, or a full build. You always know who is coming and when.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, your equipment stays healthy, and your weekends stay free. If anything ever falls short, we come back and make it right at no charge.

about.label: Why Southeast Florida Trusts Us
about.headline: We Are in the Customer Service Business — We Just Happen to Be Pool Experts
about.description: Pool Centurion was built on a simple promise: treat every pool like it is our own. With 19 professionals serving Fort Lauderdale, Miami, Key Largo, Naples, and West Palm Beach through our family of brands, we deliver the personal attention of a local company with the reach and resources of a regional one. Licensed by the Florida DBPR and rated 4.9 stars on Google, we have earned the trust of hundreds of pool owners across Southeast Florida.

features.title: Licensed & Insured Professionals
features.description: Every technician is fully insured and works under our Florida DBPR contractor license — your property is always protected.

features.title: Multi-Market Coverage
features.description: From Key Largo to Naples, our affiliated brands ensure consistent, reliable service no matter where you are in Southeast Florida.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. We treat your pool like it is our own — because that is the standard we set.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a custom quote based on your pool's size and needs. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts — just honest service you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our "Centurion Standard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will come back and make it right at no additional cost. We treat every pool like it is our own — and we would never let our own pool fall short. That is the Centurion standard, and we stand behind it every single day.

faqs.question: What areas does Pool Centurion serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Southeast Florida including Fort Lauderdale, Miami, Miami Beach, Key Largo, Naples, West Palm Beach, and surrounding communities. Through our affiliated brands, we cover the entire region from the Keys to Southwest Florida.

faqs.question: How fast can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent repairs or green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Call us at 305-367-2005 and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Pool Centurion holds Florida DBPR Contractor License CPC1458733. All technicians are fully insured and bonded, and we carry comprehensive liability coverage for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: Do you handle both construction and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes — that is what sets us apart. We offer full-lifecycle service from pool design and construction through ongoing weekly maintenance and equipment repair. One relationship covers everything your pool will ever need.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: We do. We serve hotels, HOAs, resorts, fitness centers, and multi-family properties across Southeast Florida. Commercial clients receive dedicated account management and flexible scheduling to fit their operations.

testimonials.name: Madison D.
testimonials.text: You took our new home's dirt to a beautiful oasis. We are absolutely enthralled with the result. Professional all the way.

testimonials.name: Joseph R.
testimonials.text: Nothing but good things to say about this company. The teamwork between the owners and work crews was seamless. Felt like the care for our satisfaction was a priority.

testimonials.name: Clara M.
testimonials.text: Great crew, great service, punctual, reliable, accessible. Thank you.

Ready to Experience

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no pressure — just honest pricing from a team that treats your pool like their own.
